data.body: e7a0 preflight complete: RED-first oracle 6/6 initially failed for absent [code_health]; standard-tier implementer (gpt-5.6-terra, one attempt) saw happy-path tests only; restored held-out suite 6/6 GREEN after correcting one over-specific error-text expectation under revert-first discipline; boundary mutation removing size_near_fraction upper bound made held-out test RED; refactoring litmus passed. Final focused suite 8/8 GREEN. Full make test initially exposed generated env registry drift and a pre-existing alignment oracle using first '['; regenerated docs/env-vars.md and corrected the assertion to target the final [source] annotation. Final gates: make test 7104 passed, 29 skipped, 112 deselected; make lint passed; make typecheck passed (370 source files).
